name: OpenClaw
short_desc: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way.
author: openclaw
description: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant you run on your own devices. It answers you on the channels you already use. It can speak and listen on macOS/iOS/Android, and can render a live Canvas you control. The Gateway is just the control plane - the product is the assistant.

form_fields.label: OpenClaw Gateway Password
form_fields.hint: This is an optional password for the OpenClaw Gateway. If you leave it empty, you will need to use a randomly generated token.
